节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述:
Registers a listener for application foreground/background state changes. This API uses an asynchronous callback to return the result.

**NOTE**:
It can be called only by the main thread.

for switching from the background to the foreground and a callback for switching from the foreground to the background. 2.Incorrect parameter types.
注释信息: @param { ApplicationStateChangeCallback } callback - Callback used to return the result. You can define a callback
